overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in a tan jacket leading a black and white spotted horse along a rural trail. The journey progresses from a grassy hillside with overhead power lines to a cliffside path overlooking a body of water, with a distant watchtower visible against a cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside trail with overhead power lines

agents.ego_description: leading a horse by rope through open grassland with scattered trees

notable_agents.action: black and white spotted horse walking calmly alongside the character

entered.detail: utility wires stretching across the sky between wooden poles
deciduous trees with green foliage dotting the hillside
rolling green terrain with patches of wild grass
large moss-covered boulders at the edge of the path

segments.scene_description: The character leads a spotted horse through an open grassy hillside. Power lines stretch across the cloudy sky overhead while scattered oak trees dot the landscape. The terrain is uneven with rocky outcrops visible to the left as they walk along the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt path with wooden fencing and rock outcroppings

events.description: path becomes more defined with wooden fence appearing on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing to lead the horse along a narrower dirt trail bordered by fencing

notable_agents.action: horse maintaining steady pace beside the character on the path

entered.detail: weathered wooden posts and rails running alongside the trail
tall wooden electrical pole with crossbars and wires
large rocky outcropping ahead on the trail

segments.scene_description: The trail narrows into a dirt path with a weathered wooden fence on the right. A utility pole stands to the left as the character approaches a large rock formation. The overhead power lines fade from view as the path enters a more enclosed area with denser vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliffside trail overlooking water with distant watchtower

events.description: trail opens to reveal body of water on the right and cliff face on the left

agents.ego_description: leading the horse along a narrow cliffside path with water visible below

notable_agents.action: horse carefully walking along the cliff edge path

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff wall rising beside the narrow trail
calm lake or river visible below the cliff edge
tall wooden tower structure perched on the distant hilltop

segments.scene_description: The path transforms into a narrow cliffside trail with a steep rock face on the left and a sweeping view of a body of water on the right. A wooden watchtower stands atop a distant hill. The character continues leading the horse along the precarious path as the camera moves through overhanging branches.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, utility-lined hillside toward a precarious cliffside path overlooking the water. It begins with the character leading a spotted horse through an uneven grassy landscape dotted with oak trees and overhead power lines stretching across a cloudy sky. As the terrain narrows, the scene shifts toward a dirt path bordered by a weathered wooden fence and a large rock formation, while the power lines fade from view into denser vegetation. The path then transforms into a narrow ledge with a steep rock face on the left and a sweeping vista of a distant body of water on the right. Finally, the camera moves through overhanging branches as the character continues along the cliffside toward a wooden watchtower perched atop a far hill.
